metadata.description: Agent skills for credit-card rewards research, card matching, discount discovery, application sequencing, 5/24 planning, and benefit reminders.

plugins.name: credit-card-rewards
plugins.description: Research credit-card offers, compare rewards and bonuses, build 5/24-aware application paths, and design benefit reminders.

plugins.name: credit-card-discounts
plugins.description: Find card-linked offers, issuer discounts, shopping portal deals, brand promotions, and stackable savings for planned purchases.
